<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Metadata; /** * @immutable * * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class UsesClassesThatExtendClass extends Metadata { /** * @var class-string */ private string $className; /** * @param int<0, 1> $level * @param class-string $className */ protected function __construct(int $level, string $className) { parent::__construct($level); $this->className = $className; } public function isUsesClassesThatExtendClass(): true { return true; } /** * @return class-string */ public function className(): string { return $this->className; } }
